demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is pounding relentlessly, I can't catch my breath when I walk to the bathroom, and my legs are swollen tight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's gotten a lot worse tonight — the headache won't shift even after paracetamol, my breathing is bad just walking a few steps, and my home blood pressure machine read really high.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness and breathlessness have crept up over the past week; the bad headache came on this evening
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of getting worse, with the headache for the last few hours tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a severe throbbing headache all over my head, breathlessness when I move about, and tight heavy swollen legs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the headache is really severe and won't ease; the breathlessness stops me doing much at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: headache all over my head; breathlessness in my chest when I move; swelling in both lower legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse this evening; breathlessness worse when I lie flat or walk; can only sit up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright helps my breathing a little; nothing has helped the headache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes my breathing worse; walking even to the bathroom leaves me gasping
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very tired and low on energy all week; my spouse says I snore very loudly and seem to stop breathing and gasp in my sleep, and I'm sleepy all day; a chronic heavy full feeling under my right ribs
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had high blood pressure for a while and take a tablet for it, but I've never felt this breathless before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't lie down to sleep and I get breathless just crossing the room

past_medical_history.how_managed: a blood pressure tablet, but I've missed it the last three days

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I'm very overweight and my waist has kept getting bigger over the years
a heavy, full feeling under my right ribs that I've had for a long time

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I eat a lot of packaged and salty food and don't do much exercise
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my spouse is here with me and made the call because they were worried about my breathing and the headache

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home blood-pressure cuff of unknown calibration, taken while distressed
self-reported weight, not measured on a calibrated scale

objective_data_offered.value: both lower legs look swollen and tight; there are dark, thickened, velvety patches of skin on the back of the neck
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over video only; depth of swelling and skin changes not formally examined

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports very loud snoring with episodes of stopping breathing and gasping at night, and heavy daytime sleepiness; tonight he looks distressed by the headache and is breathing with visible effort but is talking in sentences
